Having trouble buying?

About

Meme coins are awesome. The democratization of crypto? Maybe. But at least everyone gets a chance and it’s not just a big VC-led party that everyone gets a late invite to and comes home with no clothes or wallet.
PepeX was created to let anyone launch a token. An actual fair launch where 95% tokens are for public sale. And if founders fail, they lose their 5%.
The strong will bond. The weak will be removed in 72 hours.

“PepeX delivers everything pump.fun can’t”

“smart money is ready to flood into PepeX”

“ついに99%の人々を優遇するプラットフォームとして”

How to Buy

Purchase On Site
Transfer to Wallet
1

Link Your Crypto Wallet

Navigate to the payment section of the website and click on the "Connect Wallet" button. Follow the steps provided to link your wallet. Ensure that you have enough funds to cover both the transaction amount and any applicable network fees for your chosen cryptocurrency (ETH, SOL, USDC, USDT, or BNB).
2

Choose Your Token and Quantity

Select the token you want to use and enter the number of PEPX tokens you wish to purchase. Check your wallet balance to verify it can cover the cost of the transaction.
3

Complete and Approve the Transaction

Review your purchase and approve the transaction in your wallet. After approval, the tokens will be securely recorded on the blockchain.

Roadmap

Stage 1

Foundation & Core Development

(0-3 months)
Develop standardized, immutable token contracts with built-in anti-rug features
Implement a transparent liquidity locking mechanism.
Automate fair distribution (e.g., 5% founder allocation, 95% community).
Add founder wallet tracking view
AI-Powered Token Launch System
Build an AI-driven launchpad that allows users to create tokens with a 3-minute SLA.
Enable AI-generated branding (memes, logos, tickers).
Deploy AI agents for automated social media setup on Telegram and X.
Security & Trust Mechanisms
Standardized smart contracts eliminate the need for audits + central issuer contract full audit & share publicly
Develop proprietary bubble maps to ensure transparent token ownership.
Stage 2

AI Agent Ecosystem

(6 weeks)
AI Marketing & Community Management Agents
AI bots for automated promotion on X, Telegram, and other platforms.
Test AI-driven engagement strategies for meme virality/tone of voice tests
Automated moderation tools to prevent scams and spam.
Value Redistribution Mechanism
Develop a fee-sharing model where PEPX holders earn from platform transactions.
Ensure project founders take financial responsibility for failed launches.
Stage 3

Scaling & Expansion

(6-12 months)
DEX Partnerships & Liquidity Enhancements
Secure partnerships with major decentralized exchanges (DEXs) for Solana launches
Define bonding process
Advanced AI Enhancements
AI-powered analytics for token performance tracking
Personalized AI advisory tools for launch strategies
AI-assisted trading signals for PEPX holders
Community & Governance (DAO Integration)
Enable community-led funding for high-potential token launches.
Reward top-performing AI agents with platform incentives.
Security & Trust Mechanisms V2
Implement real-time on-chain monitoring for fraud detection.
Stage 4

The PepeX Revolution

(12+ months)
Decentralized AI Launchpad Takeover
Compete directly with Pump.fun through superior AI automation.
Expand PepeX as the default platform for AI-driven memecoin launches.
Drive mass adoption with viral campaigns and influencer partnerships.

faq

What is PepeX?

PepeX is an AI-powered token launchpad that enables users to launch tokens with no coding skills, while ensuring fairer launches with anti-sniping protections.

How does PepeX differ from Pump.fun?

Unlike Pump.fun, PepeX prevents insider manipulation by capping founder allocations at 5% and redistributing locked liquidity from failed projects back to the community.

What blockchain does PepeX operate on?

PepeX is multi-chain, allowing users to launch tokens on multiple networks with minimal effort.

How does PepeX use AI?

PepeX features an AI-powered marketing bot that automates promotion, social media growth, and community engagement.

What fees are involved in launching a token?

Launching a token on PepeX requires a $500 fee, and additional AI marketing services can be purchased using PEPX tokens.

How does PepeX reward token holders?

PepeX holders earn a share of all platform fees, providing passive income from launchpad activity.

Is there a staking or revenue-sharing model?

Yes, PEPX holders can stake their tokens to earn a portion of transaction fees.

What happens if a project fails?

If a project fails, the founders lose their locked liquidity, which is then redistributed to the community.

How does PepeX prevent rug pulls?

PepeX locks liquidity and limits founder allocations, ensuring that developers can’t dump tokens on retail investors.

What security measures does PepeX have?

The platform uses AuditGPT, an AI-powered auditing tool, to review and verify token contracts.
